title: Prepare release v0.5.26

sources.reason: Defines the PR-first release sequence and release evidence expectations.
Canonical public release metadata and release tag pointer.
Defines command-owned generation and validation of release evidence.
Defines post-merge exact-SHA tag and GitHub Release publication.

riskAssessment.reason: The PR changes only the public release pointer and command-generated evidence; incorrect metadata can be caught by local and PR checks before publication.

executionDecision.reason: Release scope, evidence sources, acceptance, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review releaseTag and all generated evidence together; do not hand-edit generated artifacts.
Confirm the PR target is main and publish the tag only after the merged main SHA has fresh smoke and compatibility evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json declares exactly v0.5.26 and preserves the existing public contract and capabilities.
SBOM, provenance, and release-digests are regenerated through scripts/check_supply_chain.py for the approved release preparation source commit and agree with release.json.
The release preparation PR targets main, contains only the declared release metadata, generated evidence, and Work Item records, and is ready for the repository release workflow after merge.
The merged main commit can be published by dispatching .github/workflows/release.yml with tag v0.5.26 and its exact SHA.
guidelines: Treat release.json as the canonical public release version.
Generate SBOM, provenance, and release-digests with the repository command; do not hand-edit generated artifacts.
Do not claim public publication until the post-merge release workflow succeeds.

intent.problem: The repository is still advertising v0.5.25 while the next release must be prepared from the latest origin/main as v0.5.26.
constraints: Use the PR-first release sequence and target main.
Keep generated supply-chain evidence command-owned and internally consistent.
Do not publish or overwrite the immutable v0.5.25 tag.
intent.rationale: A small, auditable release-preparation PR lets CI validate the exact metadata and evidence before the maintainer dispatches the exact-SHA release workflow.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: release metadata points to the next patch tag

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested continuation of the v0.5.26 release preparation; generated release evidence under .ai/cockpit is in scope.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
